front_line: Data center cooling systems for the AI buildout boom
thesis: Every new data center contract becomes recurring revenue for 5-7 years as AI chips get hotter. But consecutive earnings misses of 15-35% while trading at 89x free cash flow suggests they're losing the race against commoditization despite massive demand.
moat: Switching costs only apply to replacements, not new construction
risks: Consecutive quarters of 15-35% earnings misses during supposed demand boom

drafts.x_post: SOLS: Data center cooling for AI boom. Massive demand but missing earnings by 15-35% two quarters straight at 89x FCF. Real question: can recurring revenue compound faster than margins get commoditized? Dead Simple Score: 86 (Silver) 🔍
video_talking_points: Solstice makes cooling systems for data centers during the AI buildout boom.
AI chips are getting denser and hotter, creating massive thermal management demand.
Each new contract becomes recurring revenue for 5-7 years as the physics problem worsens.
They've missed earnings by 15-35% in back-to-back quarters while carrying heavy debt.
Watchlist only - great market but poor execution at 89x free cash flow valuation.

image.query: Computer or data center COOLING (something related to cooling and AI)
